channel.title: AWS on Scorpiosec
channel.description: Recent content in AWS on Scorpiosec

item.title: HTB: Facts
item.description: Platform: Hack The Box Link: Facts Level: Easy OS: Linux Scanning nmap -p- --open -T4 -sCV -oA nmap/Facts {TARGET_IP} Results Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-02-03 12:26 CST Nmap scan report for 10.129.108.147 Host is up (0.11s latency). Not shown: 52251 closed tcp ports (conn-refused), 13281 filtered tcp ports (no-response) Some closed ports may be reported as filtered due to --defeat-rst-ratelimit PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 9.
